rules.notes: PLM is the system of record for the manufacturer part number.
PLM description wins; falls back to the longest/most-complete description when trust ties.
PLM/ERP master data is more reliable than procurement free-text.
PLM commodity/category classification is the governed taxonomy.
Lifecycle status changes over time (active -> nrnd -> obsolete); the most recently updated source wins, not the most trusted one.
Longest/most-complete free-text spec summary is most useful for functional-equivalent matching.
